message:
test(fcp-conformance/streaming-sse): pin SseEvent + SseConfig builder/defaults/buffer-ceiling/header-redaction (resolves flywheel_connectors-diw6d)

26 tests pinning the SSE primitives every push connector composes.
Zero prior conformance coverage despite documented 64 MiB buffer
ceiling, header-value redaction in Debug, and reconnect defaults.

- SseEvent: new constructs data-only (event/id/retry=None), with_event
  + with_id populate exactly one field each, builder chain preserves
  all fields, PartialEq compares full struct
- is_event predicate: exact-string match (NOT substring, NOT
  case-insensitive), returns false on default event with event=None
- json deserialization: valid payload roundtrips, propagates
  serde_json::Error on malformed input AND on type mismatch
- SseConfig defaults: timeout=None, max_buffer_size=1 MiB, headers
  empty, auto_reconnect=true, max_reconnect_attempts=Some(10),
  reconnect_delay=1s; new()=default()
- Builder chain mutability + with_header replace-on-duplicate-key
- with_max_buffer_size clamps at MAX_SSE_BUFFER_SIZE = 64 MiB ceiling
  (DoS protection); below-ceiling and at-ceiling values preserved
- Debug redacts header VALUES with [REDACTED] but keeps keys visible
  — security: bearer tokens / API keys MUST NOT leak via Debug

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
